amend.draganddropquestion: Drag and drop the correct option to amend the previous commit with a new message.
amend.prompt_zh: 拖放正確選項，用新訊息修改前一個 commit

amend.question: What does 'git commit --amend' do?
options: Creates a new commit that undoes the previous one.
Modifies the most recent commit, combining staged changes and/or changing the message.
Pushes changes to the remote repository.
amend.answer_zh: 修改最近一個 commit，可合併 staged 變更或更新訊息

bestpractices.draganddropquestion: Drag and drop the command to run before git push to avoid conflicts.
bestpractices.prompt_zh: 拖放在 git push 前該執行的指令以避免衝突

bestpractices.question: Why should you write clear commit messages?
options: To help you and your team understand the project history.
bestpractices.prompt_zh: 為什麼要寫清楚的 commit 訊息？
bestpractices.answer_zh: 幫助自己與團隊理解專案歷史

bestpractices.question: Which file should you use to prevent tracking of build artifacts, logs, and secrets?
bestpractices.prompt_zh: 哪個檔案用來避免追蹤 build 產物、log、機密？

branch.question: Which command switches to an existing branch?
branch.prompt_zh: 哪個指令切換到既有分支？

branch.draganddropquestion: Drag and drop the correct command to create a new branch called hello-world-images.
branch.prompt_zh: 拖放正確指令以建立名為 hello-world-images 的新分支

branch_merge.draganddropquestion: Drag and drop the correct command to merge the hello-you branch into the current branch.
branch_merge.prompt_zh: 拖放正確指令把 hello-you 分支合併進當前分支

branch_merge.question: Which command aborts a merge in progress?
branch_merge.prompt_zh: 哪個指令中止進行中的合併？

branch_merge.question: What does a merge conflict mean?
options: There are incompatible changes in both branches that must be resolved manually.
The merge was successful and no further action is needed.
A branch was deleted during the merge.
branch_merge.answer_zh: 兩個分支有不相容的變更需要手動解決

branch_pull_from_remote.question: Which command lists all local and remote branches?
branch_pull_from_remote.prompt_zh: 哪個指令列出所有本地與遠端分支？

branch_pull_from_remote.draganddropquestion: Drag and drop the correct command to switch to a remote branch after fetching or pulling.
branch_pull_from_remote.prompt_zh: 拖放在 fetch 或 pull 後切換到遠端分支的指令

branch_pull_from_remote.question: After switching to a new remote branch, which command updates it with the latest changes?
branch_pull_from_remote.prompt_zh: 切換到新遠端分支後，哪個指令更新最新變更？
從遠端拉取分支填空題

branch_push_to_remote.question: Which command will push your current branch to the remote named 'origin'?
branch_push_to_remote.prompt_zh: 哪個指令把當前分支推送到名為 'origin' 的遠端？
推送分支到遠端的填空題

branch_push_to_remote.draganddropquestion: Drag and drop the correct option to push all local branches to the remote 'origin'.
branch_push_to_remote.prompt_zh: 拖放正確選項把所有本地分支推送到 'origin'

cherrypick_patch.draganddropquestion: Drag and drop the correct argument to add a line to the commit message showing where the commit came from.
cherrypick_patch.prompt_zh: 拖放正確參數，在 commit 訊息中加上來源 commit 的資訊

cherrypick_patch.question: What does git format-patch do?
options: Applies a patch to your branch
Creates a patch file from one or more commits
Copies a commit from another branch
cherrypick_patch.answer_zh: 從一個或多個 commit 產生 patch 檔

cicd.draganddropquestion: Drag and drop the correct event to trigger a CI/CD workflow on every code push.
cicd.prompt_zh: 拖放每次 push 程式時觸發 CI/CD 工作流的事件名稱

cicd.question: Which file tells GitHub Actions how to run CI for your project?
cicd.prompt_zh: 哪個檔案告訴 GitHub Actions 如何跑專案的 CI？

clone.draganddropquestion: Drag and drop the correct command to clone a repository to your computer.
clone.prompt_zh: 拖放正確指令把儲存庫複製到電腦

clone.question: What does the 'git clone' command do?
options: Copies a remote repository to your local machine
clone.answer_zh: 把遠端儲存庫複製到本地

commit.draganddropquestion: Drag and drop the correct flag to add a commit message.
commit.prompt_zh: 拖放加入 commit 訊息的正確 flag

commit.question: What does a Git commit do?
options: Saves a snapshot of your project with a message.
Resets your project to a previous state.
commit.answer_zh: 以訊息儲存專案的快照

config.draganddropquestion: Drag and drop the correct code to set your Git user name globally.
config.prompt_zh: 拖放全域設定 Git 使用者名稱的正確程式碼

config.question: Which command lists all your Git configuration settings?
config.prompt_zh: 哪個指令列出所有 Git 設定？

getstarted.draganddropquestion: Drag and drop the correct command to change into your new project directory.
getstarted.prompt_zh: 拖放切換到新專案目錄的正確指令

getstarted.question: What is a Git repository?
options: A place to Get Good in.
A folder that Git tracks for changes.
getstarted.answer_zh: Git 追蹤變更的資料夾

gitattributes.draganddropquestion: Drag and drop the correct keyword to mark all PNG files as binary in .gitattributes.
gitattributes.prompt_zh: 拖放在 .gitattributes 中標記所有 PNG 為 binary 的關鍵字

gitattributes.question: What is one common use for .gitattributes?
options: To specify which files to ignore in the repository
To set file handling rules like line endings, binary/text, or custom diff
To store large files outside the repository
gitattributes.answer_zh: 設定檔案處理規則（換行符、二進位/文字、自訂 diff 等）

help.draganddropquestion: Drag and drop the correct flag to show help for the status command.
help.prompt_zh: 拖放顯示 status 指令說明的正確 flag

help.question: Which command shows a quick summary of options for git commit?
help.prompt_zh: 哪個指令快速顯示 git commit 的選項摘要？

history.draganddropquestion: Drag and drop the correct flag to show a summary of all commits.
history.prompt_zh: 拖放顯示所有 commit 摘要的正確 flag

history.question: Which command shows only commits from the last week?
history.prompt_zh: 哪個指令只顯示最近一週的 commit？

hooks.draganddropquestion: Drag and drop the correct command to search for "console.log" in all .js files in a pre-commit hook.
hooks.prompt_zh: 拖放在 pre-commit hook 中搜尋所有 .js 檔內 "console.log" 的正確指令

hooks.question: Which hook runs before you make a commit and can be used to check code style?
hooks.prompt_zh: 哪個 hook 在 commit 前執行，可用來檢查程式風格？

ignore.draganddropquestion: Drag and drop the correct code to ignore all .log files in .gitignore.
ignore.prompt_zh: 拖放在 .gitignore 忽略所有 .log 檔案的正確程式碼

ignore.question: Which pattern will ignore all files with the .tmp extension in .gitignore?
ignore.prompt_zh: 在 .gitignore 中哪個 pattern 會忽略所有 .tmp 副檔名檔案？

install.draganddropquestion: Drag and drop the correct code to check your installed Git version.
install.prompt_zh: 拖放檢查已安裝 Git 版本的正確程式碼

install.question: Which command installs Git on Ubuntu?
install.prompt_zh: 哪個指令在 Ubuntu 上安裝 Git？

lfs.draganddropquestion: Drag and drop the correct command to initialize Git LFS in your repository.
lfs.prompt_zh: 拖放在儲存庫初始化 Git LFS 的正確指令

lfs.question: What does Git LFS do?
options: Stores large files directly in your Git repository
Stores pointers in your repo and large files on a separate server
Compresses all files in your repo
Deletes large files from your repo
lfs.answer_zh: 在儲存庫存指標、把大檔放在另外的伺服器

merge_conflicts.draganddropquestion: Drag and drop the correct argument to keep only the other branch's changes during a conflict.
merge_conflicts.prompt_zh: 拖放在衝突中只保留另一分支變更的正確參數

merge_conflicts.question: Which command shows you which files have merge conflicts?
merge_conflicts.prompt_zh: 哪個指令顯示有合併衝突的檔案？

new_files.draganddropquestion: Drag and drop the correct command to list files in your project directory.
new_files.prompt_zh: 拖放列出專案目錄中檔案的正確指令

new_files.question: What does it mean if a file is untracked in Git?
options: It is being tracked for changes by Git.
It has been staged and committed.
Git does not know about this file yet.
new_files.prompt_zh: 檔案在 Git 中是 untracked 代表什麼？
new_files.answer_zh: Git 還不認識這個檔案

pull_from_remote.question: Which command downloads new data from a remote repository but does NOT change your working files or branches?
pull_from_remote.prompt_zh: 哪個指令從遠端下載新資料但不變動工作檔案或分支？

pull_from_remote.draganddropquestion: Drag and drop the correct remote name to pull changes from the default remote repository.
pull_from_remote.prompt_zh: 拖放從預設遠端拉取變更的正確 remote 名稱
從遠端拉取進階填空題

push_to_remote.draganddropquestion: Drag and drop the correct command to upload local commits to the remote repository.
push_to_remote.prompt_zh: 拖放把本地 commit 上傳到遠端的正確指令

push_to_remote.question: Which action is always required before you can push new changes to a remote repository?
push_to_remote.prompt_zh: 在 push 新變更到遠端前，必須做什麼？

rebase.draganddropquestion: Drag and drop the correct option to continue a rebase after resolving conflicts.
rebase.prompt_zh: 拖放解決衝突後繼續 rebase 的正確選項

rebase.question: What does 'git rebase -i' do?
options: Starts an interactive rebase to edit, reorder, squash, or fix up commits.
Skips the current commit during a rebase.
Pushes all rebased commits to the remote repository.
rebase.answer_zh: 啟動互動式 rebase 來編輯、重排、squash、修正 commit

recovery.draganddropquestion: Drag and drop the correct option to show the reflog and recover lost commits.
recovery.prompt_zh: 拖放顯示 reflog 並恢復遺失 commit 的正確選項

recovery.question: Which command can you use to recover a deleted or changed file from the latest commit?
recovery.prompt_zh: 哪個指令可從最新 commit 恢復被刪除或變更的檔案？

reflog.draganddropquestion: Drag and drop the correct option to show the log of reference updates (HEAD and branch changes).
reflog.prompt_zh: 拖放顯示 reference 更新（HEAD 與分支變動）log 的正確選項

reflog.question: What is the purpose of 'git reflog'?
options: To show the log of reference updates (HEAD and branch changes)
To delete all commits in the repository
To push changes to the remote repository
reflog.answer_zh: 顯示 reference 更新（HEAD 與分支變動）的 log

remote_advanced.draganddropquestion: Drag and drop the correct command to add a new remote named upstream.
remote_advanced.prompt_zh: 拖放新增名為 upstream 的遠端的正確指令

remote_advanced.question: Which command lists all remotes and their URLs?
remote_advanced.prompt_zh: 哪個指令列出所有遠端與其 URL？

remote_branch.draganddropquestion: Drag and drop the correct command to switch to a branch called 'branch-name'.
remote_branch.prompt_zh: 拖放切換到名為 'branch-name' 分支的正確指令

remote_branch.question: Which command creates a new branch and switches to it?
remote_branch.prompt_zh: 哪個指令建立新分支並切換到它？

remote_branch.question: How do you delete a branch named 'feature' locally?
remote_branch.prompt_zh: 如何在本地刪除名為 'feature' 的分支？

remote_send_pull_request.draganddropquestion: Drag and drop the correct remote name to push the branch 'feature' to your remote origin.
remote_send_pull_request.prompt_zh: 拖放把 'feature' 分支推送到 origin 的正確 remote 名稱
送出 pull request 填空題

remote_send_pull_request.question: After pushing your changes to your fork, what is the next step to suggest your changes to the original repository?
remote_send_pull_request.prompt_zh: 把變更 push 到自己的 fork 後，下一步是？

reset.draganddropquestion: Drag and drop the correct option to reset to the commit with hash abc1234 and keep changes staged.
reset.prompt_zh: 拖放 reset 到 commit hash abc1234 並保留 staged 變更的正確選項

reset.question: What does 'git reset --hard' do?
options: Moves HEAD to a commit and deletes all changes in the working directory and index.
Moves HEAD to a commit but keeps all changes staged.
Moves HEAD to a commit but keeps all changes in the working directory.
Unstages a file from the index.
reset.answer_zh: 把 HEAD 移到指定 commit 並刪除工作目錄與 index 中的所有變更

revert.draganddropquestion: Drag and drop the correct command to revert the latest commit.
revert.prompt_zh: 拖放 revert 最新 commit 的正確指令

revert.question: What does 'git revert' do?
options: Deletes the commit permanently from history.
Creates a new commit that undoes the changes of a previous commit.
Moves HEAD to a previous commit.
Removes all files from the repository.
revert.answer_zh: 建立一個新 commit 來撤銷前一個 commit 的變更

security_ssh.draganddropquestion: Drag and drop the correct algorithm to generate a new SSH key pair.
security_ssh.prompt_zh: 拖放產生新 SSH key pair 的正確演算法

security_ssh.question: Which command adds your private SSH key to the SSH agent?
security_ssh.prompt_zh: 哪個指令把私鑰加到 SSH agent？

security_ssh.question: What should you NEVER do with your private SSH key?
options: Back it up in a safe place

security_ssh.question: Which file do you add to your GitHub/Bitbucket/GitLab account for SSH access?
security_ssh.prompt_zh: 要在 GitHub/Bitbucket/GitLab 帳號加入哪個檔案以啟用 SSH 存取？

set_remote.draganddropquestion: Drag and drop the correct subcommand to add a new remote.
set_remote.prompt_zh: 拖放新增遠端的正確子指令

set_remote.question: How do you update the URL for an existing remote named 'origin'?
set_remote.prompt_zh: 如何更新名為 'origin' 的遠端 URL？

signing.draganddropquestion: Drag and drop the correct flag to sign a commit.
signing.prompt_zh: 拖放簽署 commit 的正確 flag

signing.question: What is the main purpose of signing a Git commit?
options: To prove the commit was made by you and has not been tampered with
To add a comment to the commit
signing.prompt_zh: 簽署 Git commit 的主要目的是？
signing.answer_zh: 證明 commit 由你發出且未被竄改

staging_environment.question: What is the purpose of the staging area in Git?
options: To display files on a stage.
To select which changes will go into the next commit.
staging_environment.prompt_zh: Git 中 staging 區的用途是？
staging_environment.answer_zh: 選擇哪些變更要進入下一次 commit

staging_environment.draganddropquestion: Drag and drop the correct command to stage a file.
staging_environment.prompt_zh: 拖放 stage 一個檔案的正確指令

stash.draganddropquestion: Drag and drop the correct command to apply and remove the most recent stash.
stash.prompt_zh: 拖放套用並移除最新 stash 的正確指令

stash.question: What does git stash do?
options: Saves your uncommitted changes for later.
stash.answer_zh: 暫存未 commit 的變更供之後使用

submodules.draganddropquestion: Drag and drop the correct command to add a submodule to your project.
submodules.prompt_zh: 拖放在專案加入 submodule 的正確指令

submodules.question: Which file keeps track of all submodules and their paths in your repository?
submodules.prompt_zh: 哪個檔案紀錄儲存庫所有 submodule 與其路徑？

tagging.draganddropquestion: Drag and drop the correct flag to create an annotated tag with a message.
tagging.prompt_zh: 拖放建立帶訊息的 annotated tag 的正確 flag

tagging.question: What is the main purpose of a Git tag?
options: To delete files from the repository.
To mark important points or releases in the project history.
To reset the repository to a previous state.
tagging.prompt_zh: Git tag 的主要用途是？
tagging.answer_zh: 標記專案歷史中的重要時間點或 release

workflow.draganddropquestion: Drag and drop the correct command to move changes from the working directory to the staging area.
workflow.prompt_zh: 拖放把變更從 working directory 移到 staging area 的正確指令

workflow.question: Which area in Git holds changes before they are committed?
workflow.prompt_zh: Git 中哪個區域存放尚未 commit 的變更？

workflow.question: What command saves staged changes to your local repository?
workflow.prompt_zh: 哪個指令把 staged 變更存到本地儲存庫？

workflow.question: Which command shows the current status of files in your working directory and staging area?
workflow.prompt_zh: 哪個指令顯示工作目錄與 staging 區的當前狀態？
